description: Vertical OSHA graphic built on a winter photograph. The photo shows two white snowplow trucks with orange front plow blades on a snow-covered, tree-lined road during snowfall, headlights on, surrounded by snow-laden bare trees and an overcast landscape. In the upper-left is the blue 'OSHA' logo (Occupational Safety and Health Administration). The lower portion fades to a dark navy gradient and carries large bold white italic serif text 'WINTER SAFETY' flanked by dashes, with the URL 'OSHA.GOV/WINTER-WEATHER' beneath in white capitals. The palette is blue and white.
